kiosk.Title: Join the Team Behind The Red
kiosk.Summary: Red Mobile is the first digital kiosk and community‑driven information hub built for the Red River Gorge, Natural Bridge, & surrounding region. As we grow, we’re looking for passionate individuals who want to help shape the future of this platform.
Facts: A Community‑Powered Platform built on a simple principle: when the community grows, everyone grows with it.
Whether you’re a local resident, a frequent visitor, a creative mind, or someone who simply loves the region, there’s a place for you here.
These early roles are limited for now as we establish our foundation. They are also the first step toward something much bigger.
For now, we’re building a small, dedicated team of volunteers to help as we stucture the groundwork for the platform.
Our early team members & volunteers can participate in a profit‑sharing model, where various contributions are divided among those actively helping to develop, manage, or support the platform.
